The '''Merr-Sonn stun baton''' was a [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]] designed for crowd control. The weapon was manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] and used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

==Description==
[[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn's]] stun baton was a simple weighted [[Club/Legends|club]] that was installed with a [[Shock generator|shock charge generator]]. The baton had a weight inside that could be slid towards one end of the weapon or the other that altered the amount of physical damage that could be dealt out with each blow.<ref name="EGWT" />

The stun baton had ridges that were fitted with miniature [[shock projector]]s along its length that were capable of delivering a painful [[Stun/Legends|stun]] charge. The intensity of the stun setting could be changed by rotating a small dial above the stun baton's recharge socket. Individuals stuck with the stun baton were paralyzed for several [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], with most victims being rendered unconscious after a single blow. A rechargeable [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] gave the weapon three [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] of continuous use.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
The stun baton was effective against unarmed protestors, and was used extensively by the [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. Although marketed as a human crowd-control weapon, Merr-Sonn's stun baton could [[Death/Legends|kill]] when at full charge.<ref name="EGWT" />
